raw:
{
  "task_plan": [
    {
      "task_id": "task_06_sync_primitives",
      "question_ids": ["Q06_001", "Q06_002", "Q06_003", "Q06_004", "Q06_012", "Q06_013", "Q06_017", "Q06_020", "Q06_021"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证内核同步原语（SpinLock, Mutex, RwLock, Semaphore, Condvar, WaitQueue, Barrier, 原子操作）的定义、实现体、操作语义、调度器阻塞/唤醒集成、lost wakeup 防护、死锁防护，并区分概念边界。完成 fact_id: Q06_001_01~Q06_001_06, Q06_002_01~Q06_002_06, Q06_003_01~Q06_003_06, Q06_004_01~Q06_004_06, Q06_012_01~Q06_012_06, Q06_013_01~Q06_013_06, Q06_017_01~Q06_017_06, Q06_020_01~Q06_020_06, Q06_021_01~Q06_021_05",
      "group_reason": "这些题共享同一实现线索：同步原语的定义、实现体、操作语义、调度器集成、死锁防护。需要统一搜索 kernel/sync, include/sync, kernel/sched, include/sched 等目录，并利用 LSP 追踪调用链。",
      "query": "搜索并读取 kernel/sync, include/sync, kernel/sched, include/sched 目录下的文件，查找 SpinLock, Mutex, RwLock, Semaphore, Condvar, WaitQueue, Barrier 等同步原语的结构定义、lock/unlock/wait/signal/wakeup 等操作实现体、是否接入调度器阻塞/唤醒状态机、是否有 lost wakeup 防护、死锁防护机制。同时查找原子操作来源（Rust core::sync::atomic 或自定义汇编）。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/sync", "include/sync", "kernel/sched", "include/sched", "kernel/proc", "include/proc"],
      "entry_symbols": ["SpinLock", "Mutex", "RwLock", "Semaphore", "Condvar", "WaitQueue", "Barrier", "sleep", "wakeup", "atomic"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_06_pipe",
      "question_ids": ["Q06_005", "Q06_006", "Q06_007"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证管道 (Pipe) 是否实现，包括 pipe 结构定义、pipe_write/pipe_read 实现体、缓冲形态（环形缓冲区/页级传递）、阻塞语义（挂起等待队列/返回 EAGAIN/忙等）。完成 fact_id: Q06_005_01~Q06_005_06, Q06_006_01~Q06_006_06, Q06_007_01~Q06_007_06",
      "group_reason": "这些题共享同一实现线索：管道 (Pipe) 的实现。需要搜索 kernel/fs, include/fs 等目录，查找 pipe 相关结构、读写函数、缓冲机制和阻塞语义。",
      "query": "搜索并读取 kernel/fs, include/fs 目录下的文件，查找 pipe 结构定义、pipe_write/pipe_read 函数实现体、缓冲区的实现方式（环形缓冲区/页级传递）、阻塞/非阻塞/忙等语义。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/fs", "include/fs", "kernel/ipc", "include/ipc"],
      "entry_symbols": ["pipe", "pipe_write", "pipe_read", "Pipe"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_06_sysv_ipc",
      "question_ids": ["Q06_008", "Q06_019"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证 SysV IPC（消息队列/信号量/共享内存）是否实现，包括 syscall table 入口、内核对象、权限/ID 分配、阻塞/唤醒、资源释放。完成 fact_id: Q06_008_01~Q06_008_05, Q06_019_01~Q06_019_05",
      "group_reason": "这些题共享同一实现线索：SysV IPC (msg/sem/shm) 的实现。需要搜索 kernel/ipc, kernel/syscall, include/ipc 等目录，查找 msgget/msgsnd/msgrcv/semget/semop/shmget/shmat 等系统调用入口和内核对象。",
      "query": "搜索并读取 kernel/ipc, kernel/syscall, include/ipc 目录下的文件，查找 msgget/msgsnd/msgrcv/semget/semop/shmget/shmat 等系统调用入口、内核对象定义、权限/ID 分配、阻塞/唤醒、资源释放的实现。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/ipc", "kernel/syscall", "include/ipc", "kernel/proc", "include/proc"],
      "entry_symbols": ["msgget", "msgsnd", "msgrcv", "semget", "semop", "shmget", "shmat", "SYS_msg", "SYS_sem", "SYS_shm"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_06_futex",
      "question_ids": ["Q06_009"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证 futex 是否实现，包括 sys_futex 入口、用户地址值比较、FUTEX_WAIT 挂起任务到等待队列、FUTEX_WAKE 按 key 唤醒、timeout/错误地址/并发竞态处理。完成 fact_id: Q06_009_01~Q06_009_06",
      "group_reason": "这些题共享同一实现线索：futex 的实现。需要搜索 kernel/sync, kernel/ipc, kernel/syscall 等目录，查找 sys_futex 入口、FUTEX_WAIT/FUTEX_WAKE 实现体、等待队列管理。",
      "query": "搜索并读取 kernel/sync, kernel/ipc, kernel/syscall 目录下的文件，查找 sys_futex 系统调用入口、FUTEX_WAIT/FUTEX_WAKE 实现体、用户地址值比较、等待队列挂载/唤醒、timeout/错误地址/并发竞态处理。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/sync", "kernel/ipc", "kernel/syscall", "include/sync", "include/ipc"],
      "entry_symbols": ["futex", "sys_futex", "FUTEX_WAIT", "FUTEX_WAKE"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_06_signal",
      "question_ids": ["Q06_010", "Q06_011"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证信号机制（sigaction/kill/sigreturn/trampoline）是否实现，包括信号结构定义、系统调用入口、用户态 handler 上下文构建、sigreturn 恢复原 trap frame。完成 fact_id: Q06_010_01~Q06_010_06, Q06_011_01~Q06_011_06",
      "group_reason": "这些题共享同一实现线索：信号机制 (signal) 的实现。需要搜索 kernel/signal, kernel/syscall, include/signal 等目录，查找 sigaction/kill/sigreturn/trampoline 等系统调用入口和实现体。",
      "query": "搜索并读取 kernel/signal, kernel/syscall, include/signal, kernel/trap 目录下的文件，查找 sigaction/kill/sigreturn/trampoline 等系统调用入口、信号结构定义、用户态 handler 上下文构建、sigreturn 恢复原 trap frame 的实现。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/signal", "kernel/syscall", "include/signal", "kernel/trap", "include/trap"],
      "entry_symbols": ["sigaction", "kill", "sigreturn", "trampoline", "signal"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_06_deadlock",
      "question_ids": ["Q06_014", "Q06_015", "Q06_016"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证死锁四必要条件（互斥/持有并等待/不可剥夺/循环等待）是否成立、死锁处理策略（预防/避免/检测恢复/忽略）、全局锁顺序规范或 ABBA 检测。完成 fact_id: Q06_014_01~Q06_014_06, Q06_015_01~Q06_015_06, Q06_016_01~Q06_016_06",
      "group_reason": "这些题共享同一实现线索：死锁相关机制。需要搜索 kernel/sync, kernel/sched, kernel/fs, kernel/mm 等目录，查找锁实现、嵌套调用、注释规范、trylock/timeout/lockdep/ABBA 检测等。",
      "query": "搜索并读取 kernel/sync, kernel/sched, kernel/fs, kernel/mm, include/sync, include/sched 目录下的文件，查找锁实现、嵌套调用、注释规范、trylock/timeout/lockdep/ABBA 检测等，分析死锁四必要条件是否成立、死锁处理策略、全局锁顺序规范。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel/sync", "kernel/sched", "kernel/fs", "kernel/mm", "include/sync", "include/sched"],
      "entry_symbols": ["deadlock", "lock ordering", "trylock", "lockdep", "ABBA"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_06_classic_sync",
      "question_ids": ["Q06_018"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证经典同步问题（生产者-消费者/读者-写者/哲学家就餐）是否有对应实现或测试。完成 fact_id: Q06_018_01~Q06_018_06",
      "group_reason": "这些题共享同一实现线索：经典同步问题的实现或测试。需要搜索 kernel, user, test 等目录，查找 producer-consumer, readers-writers, dining philosophers 相关代码。",
      "query": "搜索并读取 kernel, user, test 目录下的文件，查找 producer-consumer, readers-writers, dining philosophers 相关实现或测试代码。",
      "seed_paths": ["kernel", "user", "test", "xv6-user"],
      "entry_symbols": ["producer", "consumer", "bounded buffer", "reader", "writer", "dining", "philosopher"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow", "negative_search"]
    }
  ]
}

task_plan.group_reason: 这些题共享同一实现线索：同步原语的定义、实现体、操作语义、调度器集成、死锁防护。需要统一搜索 kernel/sync, include/sync, kernel/sched, include/sched 等目录，并利用 LSP 追踪调用链。
task_plan.query: 搜索并读取 kernel/sync, include/sync, kernel/sched, include/sched 目录下的文件，查找 SpinLock, Mutex, RwLock, Semaphore, Condvar, WaitQueue, Barrier 等同步原语的结构定义、lock/unlock/wait/signal/wakeup 等操作实现体、是否接入调度器阻塞/唤醒状态机、是否有 lost wakeup 防护、死锁防护机制。同时查找原子操作来源（Rust core::sync::atomic 或自定义汇编）。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证管道 (Pipe) 是否实现，包括 pipe 结构定义、pipe_write/pipe_read 实现体、缓冲形态（环形缓冲区/页级传递）、阻塞语义（挂起等待队列/返回 EAGAIN/忙等）。完成 fact_id: Q06_005_01~Q06_005_06, Q06_006_01~Q06_006_06, Q06_007_01~Q06_007_06

task_plan.query: 搜索并读取 kernel/ipc, kernel/syscall, include/ipc 目录下的文件，查找 msgget/msgsnd/msgrcv/semget/semop/shmget/shmat 等系统调用入口、内核对象定义、权限/ID 分配、阻塞/唤醒、资源释放的实现。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证 futex 是否实现，包括 sys_futex 入口、用户地址值比较、FUTEX_WAIT 挂起任务到等待队列、FUTEX_WAKE 按 key 唤醒、timeout/错误地址/并发竞态处理。完成 fact_id: Q06_009_01~Q06_009_06
task_plan.group_reason: 这些题共享同一实现线索：futex 的实现。需要搜索 kernel/sync, kernel/ipc, kernel/syscall 等目录，查找 sys_futex 入口、FUTEX_WAIT/FUTEX_WAKE 实现体、等待队列管理。
task_plan.query: 搜索并读取 kernel/sync, kernel/ipc, kernel/syscall 目录下的文件，查找 sys_futex 系统调用入口、FUTEX_WAIT/FUTEX_WAKE 实现体、用户地址值比较、等待队列挂载/唤醒、timeout/错误地址/并发竞态处理。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证信号机制（sigaction/kill/sigreturn/trampoline）是否实现，包括信号结构定义、系统调用入口、用户态 handler 上下文构建、sigreturn 恢复原 trap frame。完成 fact_id: Q06_010_01~Q06_010_06, Q06_011_01~Q06_011_06
task_plan.group_reason: 这些题共享同一实现线索：信号机制 (signal) 的实现。需要搜索 kernel/signal, kernel/syscall, include/signal 等目录，查找 sigaction/kill/sigreturn/trampoline 等系统调用入口和实现体。
task_plan.query: 搜索并读取 kernel/signal, kernel/syscall, include/signal, kernel/trap 目录下的文件，查找 sigaction/kill/sigreturn/trampoline 等系统调用入口、信号结构定义、用户态 handler 上下文构建、sigreturn 恢复原 trap frame 的实现。

task_plan.task_goal: 查证死锁四必要条件（互斥/持有并等待/不可剥夺/循环等待）是否成立、死锁处理策略（预防/避免/检测恢复/忽略）、全局锁顺序规范或 ABBA 检测。完成 fact_id: Q06_014_01~Q06_014_06, Q06_015_01~Q06_015_06, Q06_016_01~Q06_016_06
task_plan.group_reason: 这些题共享同一实现线索：死锁相关机制。需要搜索 kernel/sync, kernel/sched, kernel/fs, kernel/mm 等目录，查找锁实现、嵌套调用、注释规范、trylock/timeout/lockdep/ABBA 检测等。
task_plan.query: 搜索并读取 kernel/sync, kernel/sched, kernel/fs, kernel/mm, include/sync, include/sched 目录下的文件，查找锁实现、嵌套调用、注释规范、trylock/timeout/lockdep/ABBA 检测等，分析死锁四必要条件是否成立、死锁处理策略、全局锁顺序规范。

task_plan.group_reason: 这些题共享同一实现线索：经典同步问题的实现或测试。需要搜索 kernel, user, test 等目录，查找 producer-consumer, readers-writers, dining philosophers 相关代码。
